response:
Tu n'es pas dans le DGA. Juste zoom sur et tais-toi de putain.  


This translation preserves the informal, confrontational tone of the original. "Ain't" is rendered as the colloquial "tu n'es pas," "DGA" remains untranslated (as an acronym), "zoom in" is simplified to "zoom sur" (common in informal contexts), and "shut the fuck up" is translated as "tais-toi de putain" to maintain the raw intensity.
